title: adonis flammea var. citrina
intro: Adonis flammea var. citrina, also known as the yellow Adonis or yellow anemone, is a flowering plant species within the Anemone genus, characterized by its bright yellow petals and unique growth habit. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Adonis flammea var. citrina include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and supporting skin health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Adonis flammea var. citrina can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and address specific health concerns.
